name: Kamigawa: Neon Dynasty

draft.notes: 9 commons + 1 common-or-uncommon saga + 3 uncommons + 1 rare + 1 land + ad/placeholder card. The land slot is a basic land or one of ten common dual lands. If a foil appears it displaces a common (becomes 8 commons). The saga slot is an additional double-faced common or uncommon.

statedRates: Foil rate 33% of boosters. Basic land appears in ~half of land slots (vs common dual land). Placeholder cards ~20% of the time (vs ad card).
sourceNotes: Large set; 6 double-faced commons, 8 DFC uncommons, 6 DFC rares, 3 DFC mythics. Four variations of each basic land plus ten common dual lands in the land run. Printed in USA, Belgium, Japan; US printing modeled here. 36 packs per box. Each pack carries an extra double-faced saga (common or uncommon) on top of the standard structure.
